prd.user_story: As a compliance engineer preparing a SOC 2 audit evidence bundle, I need to trace Grafana's ssoSettingsApi feature flag from its definition through SSO settings infrastructure, API endpoints, OAuth connector wiring, and authentication registration to prove the SSO settings control is implemented end-to-end.
constraints: Identify the feature flag definition in the feature management registry.
Trace the SSO settings infrastructure layer: Service interface, Reloadable interface, SSOSettings model, SSOSettingsStore database layer.
Trace the API and authentication wiring: REST API endpoints, SocialService OAuth connector loading, authentication client registration.
Include access control evaluators and the ProvideService DI function that wires the SSO settings system.
Write findings to /workspace/answer.json with comprehensive text explaining how the layers connect.
prd.success_definition: Agent identifies the 10 architecturally significant files spanning feature flag definition (registry.go, toggles_gen.go), SSO settings infrastructure (ssosettings.go, models.go, database.go), API and authentication wiring (api.go, socialimpl/service.go, registration.go), and access control and DI registration (ssoutils/utils.go, ssosettingsimpl/service.go).
prd.seed_prompt: Trace the ssoSettingsApi feature flag in grafana/grafana from its definition through the SSO settings backend infrastructure to the API endpoints and authentication wiring. Produce a compliance evidence bundle.

deepsearch_variant.variant_prompt: Use Deep Search to synthesize the end-to-end SSO settings control across feature management, SSO settings infrastructure, OAuth connectors, and authentication registration in grafana/grafana.
